entries.definition:
k–w–k–b star, planet; blossoms; to shine; water; centre of
importance, leader; party. Of this root, two words occur five
times in the Qur’an: كَوْكَب kawkab three times and كَوَاكِب kawākib
twice.

كَوْكَب kawkab [n., pl. كَوَاكِب kawākib] planets (37:6) إِنَّا زَيَّنَّا السَّمَاءَ
الدُّنْيَا بِزِينَةٍ الْكَوَاكِبِ We have adorned the lowest heaven with an
adornment, the planets.

كَوْكَب kawkab [n., pl. كَوَاكِب kawākib] planets (37:6) إِنَّا زَيَّنَّا السَّمَاءَ
